turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi there. I specifically want to know if Dr. Anand Bhosale is available this weekend. He's an orthopaedic surgeon and I need to consult him urgently.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I understand, and I want to help. Unfortunately, I don't have access to individual doctor schedules or their leave calendars, so I can't confirm Dr. Bhosale's specific availability without risking giving you wrong information.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Oh. Can you find out somehow?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Absolutely — let me connect you to our scheduling desk directly. They have live access to all doctor calendars and can confirm Dr. Bhosale's weekend slots immediately. One moment please.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Transferring you now to our scheduling team. They'll get you sorted right away.
